verification_gate: Owner (David / Governance Board) records a bounded decision resolving RFC-Q2 with an explicit unblock condition, a deferral-or-rollback rule, and the current default preserved until unblocked.

gate_result.question: RFC-Q2
gate_result.decision: Brainpacks remain RFC-only in v0: the compiled format carries exactly role, capability, and decision templates and adds no new fields.
gate_result.unblock_condition: An RFC defining additional brainpack fields (e.g. memory seeds, tool grants) with schema and owner sign-off.
gate_result.deferral_rollback_rule: Brainpack format reverts to role/capability/decision templates only.

proof_summary: DECIDE-002 records the owner-ratified bounded decision for RFC-Q2 (compiled agent brainpack format): Brainpacks remain RFC-only in v0: the compiled format carries exactly role, capability, and decision templates and adds no new fields. Unblock condition and deferral/rollback rule are recorded in 09_OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. The v0 default is preserved until an explicit unblock RFC with owner sign-off. No product execution performed.
